title: Rondo ticket frontmatter
description: Schema for the frontmatter block at the top of a Rondo ticket .md file. Applies to the parsed key:value pairs before the first blank line of the file. Body content is not validated by this schema.

owner.description: GitHub username of the human reviewer assigned to this ticket.

priority.description: Dispatch order. Lower numbers dispatch first. Ties break by filename lexical order.

model.description: Agent model identifier. 'default' is always accepted. Backend-specific aliases depend on the runner.

depends.description: Comma-separated list of ticket slugs or filenames this ticket depends on. The ticket is ineligible while any listed dependency still exists as a file in <ticketsDir>.

paused.description: Pause directive. `true` pauses indefinitely. An ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) pauses until that date.

spec.description: Optional spec version pin (e.g. '0.1'). If absent, the latest spec version the runner implements is assumed.
